retry_reason: Failure typically indicates a probe deferral or permanent error (invalid DT, missing clock provider) that cannot be fixed by retrying the same operation; the caller should propagate the error and attempt later if -EPROBE_DEFER.

judge.reason: The primary purpose is to configure clock parent assignments from device tree properties, not to manage reference counts. The function iterates over assigned-clock-parents and assigned-clocks, gets clock objects, calls clk_set_parent, and then releases references. The refcount operations (clk_get/put) are incidental to the core logic of setting up clock hierarchy.
judge.retry_reason: Failure typically indicates a probe deferral or permanent error (invalid DT, missing clock provider) that cannot be fixed by retrying the same operation; the caller should propagate the error and attempt later if -EPROBE_DEFER.
